training_data_statement: Bundled gen17 pre6 base runtime used by the overlay tuner release.
data_attestation: This bundled base runtime is included unchanged as the scorer source for the public overlay tuner release.
private_data_attestation: This bundled base runtime does not introduce validator-private human data.
notes: Bundled gen17 pre6 base runtime vendored inside the tuner-pre6 overlay release.
